description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly white and pale yellow color scheme. The front features the brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' in gold lettering above a large, realistic illustration of a yellow guava, indicating the juice flavor. The sides of the carton display nutritional information, product details, and branding, with one side showing a vertical 'FARAGELLO' label and the other side covered in text and a nutrition facts panel. The top of the carton is fitted with a white plastic screw cap, slightly offset to one side for easy pouring. The packaging appears to be made of laminated cardboard with a glossy finish, typical of juice cartons, and is designed to stand upright on flat surfaces. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail environments.
description: A white and pale yellow rectangular juice carton with a screw cap and a guava illustration on the front, featuring gold branding and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding, part of the nutrition facts panel, and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label and a large yellow guava illustration, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and 'PREMIUM GUAVA NECTAR' text, with the cap on top.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by detailed nutritional information and product text, with the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label at the top.
